  "clarification_question": "Your request could mean different kinds of review for this single paragraph—please choose one: A) Sentence-level editing for clarity/conciseness (R1.6); B) Substantive check of internal logic and whether claims match the reported numbers (R1.2, R1.3); C) High-level reframing of the core claim/thesis (R1.1). Reply with A, B, or C.",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "The paragraph makes several inferential moves (e.g., from empirical observations to general conclusions), so checking the internal argument chain is central.",
    "R1.3": "The text reports quantitative metrics and uses them to support claims, so verifying alignment between claims and the stated results is central.",
    "R1.6": "Given the brevity and focus on a single paragraph, the user may be seeking clarity and flow improvements at the sentence level.",
    "RX.1": "Any assessment should flag uncertainties and limits of inference explicitly.",
    "RX.2": "The review should avoid endorsing generalizations beyond what the reported evidence can support.",
    "RX.3": "Scope should remain confined to this paragraph rather than broader restructuring or literature coverage.",
    "RX.4": "Care is needed to avoid feedback that could inadvertently encourage misuse or overreliance on stated model confidence.",
    "RX.5": "All observations should be traceable directly to statements and numbers within the provided paragraph."
  }
}

parsed.clarification_question: Your request could mean different kinds of review for this single paragraph—please choose one: A) Sentence-level editing for clarity/conciseness (R1.6); B) Substantive check of internal logic and whether claims match the reported numbers (R1.2, R1.3); C) High-level reframing of the core claim/thesis (R1.1). Reply with A, B, or C.

rationale.R1.2: The paragraph makes several inferential moves (e.g., from empirical observations to general conclusions), so checking the internal argument chain is central.
rationale.R1.3: The text reports quantitative metrics and uses them to support claims, so verifying alignment between claims and the stated results is central.
rationale.R1.6: Given the brevity and focus on a single paragraph, the user may be seeking clarity and flow improvements at the sentence level.
rationale.RX.1: Any assessment should flag uncertainties and limits of inference explicitly.
rationale.RX.2: The review should avoid endorsing generalizations beyond what the reported evidence can support.
rationale.RX.3: Scope should remain confined to this paragraph rather than broader restructuring or literature coverage.
rationale.RX.4: Care is needed to avoid feedback that could inadvertently encourage misuse or overreliance on stated model confidence.
rationale.RX.5: All observations should be traceable directly to statements and numbers within the provided paragraph.
